applies_when: User asks whether a travel route suits them without sharing departure date or people info
User leaves a vague comment like worth going or recommend a trip
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague travel-agency inquiry into usable trip facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to avoid踩坑
Ask for departure date, number of travelers, child age if any, and destination style
Keep the next step answerable in one message
avoid: Recommending a fixed route without facts
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我什么时候走、几个人、有没有小朋友，以及更想走跟团、自由行还是轻松度假路线，我可以先帮你把线路收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides date and traveler facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is the first time booking through a travel agency
User sounds unsure whether group tour, free travel, or custom route fits
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple route decision.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the route
avoid: Pushing the most expensive route first
items.safe_transition: 第一次找旅行社先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把日期、人数、预算和更想走的节奏理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user confirms route and timing, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about passport, visa, or travel documents
User worries they may not have enough time to prepare documents
items.response_goal: Answer document concerns honestly while guiding toward a realistic route.
do: Explain there may be timing and material boundaries
Offer to narrow to the best option for that timeline
avoid: Saying documents are easy for everyone
items.safe_transition: 证件和材料确实会影响路线，我们可以先看你想去哪、什么时候走、护照在不在手上，再判断更适合哪条线。
items.handoff_suggestion: If date, destination and document facts are confirmed, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks whether the price includes taxes, visas, or extra fees
User is sensitive to single supplement, child price, or refunds
items.response_goal: Answer the budget concern clearly without overselling or hiding boundaries.
do: Clarify that different routes have different inclusions
Guide toward a lighter next step to compare fairly
items.safe_transition: 费用这块先别急着比一个总价，你把日期、人数和更想走的目的地发我，我先帮你看含税、儿童价和大概边界。
items.handoff_suggestion: If budget and route preferences are shared, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks for detailed itinerary or price comparison in public comments
User discusses passports or family details in comments
items.response_goal: Keep public replies useful but move detailed qualification into a safer short follow-up channel.
do: Invite the user to continue with key facts in DM
items.safe_transition: 评论区先不把线路说满，你把日期、人数和想去的方向发我，我再帮你细分。
items.handoff_suggestion: Move to DM and then route to Catcher.

applies_when: A returning traveler comments about booking again
User asks what is different this time
items.response_goal: Treat the reply like a revisit decision, not a fresh first-booking pitch.
do: Reference what may have changed this time
Guide toward new departures or easier arrangements
Keep the tone familiar and light
items.safe_transition: 如果你是老客回来看，我们先看这次想去哪、时间和上次相比最想变什么，再决定值不值得报。
items.handoff_suggestion: If repeat intent is clear, hand off to Followup.
